name: Jonathan Weygandt
summary: Former U.S. Marine who publicly described an alleged 1997 encounter with a crashed object in Peru.

relationships.context: First major public recorded testimony through the Disclosure Project
Alleged crash encounter while deployed in Peru
Second major public interview revisiting the Peru account

profileStatus: Former Marine and firsthand crash-encounter claimant
profileSummary: Former U.S. Marine who publicly described an alleged 1997 encounter with a crashed object in Peru.
inclusionNote: Included because his recorded testimony has circulated for decades and is foundational to crash-retrieval research. The event has not been publicly confirmed through official records.
